meta.release_notes:
# Changelog

All notable changes to this model will be documented in this file.

## [1.0.0] 26.03

### Added

- initial version of the aspect models in the material namespace for material accounting

nodes.label: Composition
nodes.description: The Composition aspect model defines a standardized and interoperable representation of material compositions, capturing material shares of a digital twin in a consistent and machine-readable manner.

nodes.label: materials
nodes.description: List of all materials.

nodes.label: materialWeight
nodes.description: Weight of a material in a part.

nodes.label: MaterialsCharacteristic
nodes.description: materials characteristic

nodes.label: MaterialEntity
nodes.description: Materials shares of a digital twin.

nodes.label: WeightCharacteristic
nodes.description: Weight Characteristic

nodes.label: Material
nodes.description: The Material aspect model defines a standardized and interoperable representation based on VDA material classification and also covering chemical, thermal, and physical properties as well as material states, formats, and uncertainty information, in a consistent and machine-readable manner.

nodes.label: thermalCharacterization
nodes.description: Characterisation of Materials Thermal: Information about the material's behaviour under various thermal conditions.

nodes.label: chemicalCharacterization
nodes.description: Characterisation of Materials Chemical: Description of the chemical composition and properties of the material.

nodes.label: physicalState
nodes.description: The physical state of the material.

nodes.label: materialFormat
nodes.description: Format of material in the process step.

nodes.label: materialStatus
nodes.description: Status of the material in the process step

nodes.label: rangeOfUncertainty
nodes.description: Tolerance specification in material composition

nodes.label: PhysicalStateEnum
nodes.description: physical state enum

nodes.label: RecyclingBatch
nodes.description: The RecyclingBatch aspect model defines a standardized and interoperable representation containing information about involved actors, process steps, and batch-specific details such as identifiers and container-related properties, in a consistent and machine-readable manner.

nodes.label: recyclingBatchId
nodes.description: Identifier of the recycling batch.

nodes.label: container
nodes.description: Properties of a container.

nodes.label: childProcessSteps
nodes.description: List of child process steps performed on the recycling batch.

nodes.label: processInformation
nodes.description: Single Entity of process information.

nodes.label: receiver
nodes.description: Receiver of the RecyclingBatch.

nodes.label: sender
nodes.description: Sender of the RecyclingBatch.

nodes.label: operator
nodes.description: Operator of the transport process.

nodes.label: containerWeight
nodes.description: Empty weight of the container based on the scale display

nodes.label: containerVolume
nodes.description: Volume of the container type according to AVAL

nodes.label: containerDescription
nodes.description: Standardized description of the container type according to AVAL.

nodes.label: containerTypeId
nodes.description: Standardized number for the container type which contains compositions / components / materials according to AVAL

nodes.label: startTimestamp
nodes.description: Start of the specific process step.

nodes.label: endTimestamp
nodes.description: End of the specific process step.

nodes.label: inputNetMass
nodes.description: Incoming net weight in the specific process step.

nodes.label: outputNetMass
nodes.description: Outgoing net weight of the specific process step.

nodes.label: measurementType
nodes.description: Measuring instrument for material share/weight determination.

nodes.label: measurementTimestamp
nodes.description: timestamp of the specific time of measurement.

nodes.label: processLoss
nodes.description: Weight of loss within the specific childProcessStep.

nodes.label: weighingSlip
nodes.description: Official document that records the result of weighing (of composition / components / materials) on a scale.

nodes.label: lossType
nodes.description: Specification of loss within the specific process step.

nodes.label: childProcessType
nodes.description: Type of child process.

nodes.label: treatmentProcedure
nodes.description: Process that is used to handle waste according to the choosen strategy.

nodes.label: mechanicalRecycling
nodes.description: Materials that have undergone mechanical recycling (true or false).

nodes.label: chemicalRecycling
nodes.description: Materials that have undergone chemical recycling (true or false).

nodes.label: processType
nodes.description: The process reflects the current processing phase in the reverse chain of a vehicle, its composition, components, and materials.

nodes.label: actorNumber
nodes.description: Operating number of the actor.

nodes.label: actorRole
nodes.description: Type of the actor in the recycling process.

nodes.label: transferId
nodes.description: Identifier for the transport of compositions / components / materials between two actors.

nodes.label: ContainerCharacteristic
nodes.description: This characteristic binds the ContainerEntity to the container property.

nodes.label: ChildProcessStepsList
nodes.description: List of child process steps.

nodes.label: ProcessInformationSingleEntity
nodes.description: Process Information SingleEntity.

nodes.label: ActorSingleEntity
nodes.description: Single entity describing an actor involved in the recycling batch.

nodes.label: OperatorSingleEntity
nodes.description: Operator Single Entity

nodes.label: ContainerEntity
nodes.description: Description of the properties of a container.

nodes.label: ProcessStep
nodes.description: Single entity of a process step.

nodes.label: ProcessInformationEntity
nodes.description: Entity of process information

nodes.label: ActorEntity
nodes.description: Single Entity of an Actor

nodes.label: OperatorEntity
nodes.description: Entity of operator

nodes.label: MassCharacteristic
nodes.description: Characteric for mass data (in kg).

nodes.label: VolumeCharacteristic
nodes.description: Characteristic describing the volume.

nodes.label: ChildProcessEnum
nodes.description: Enumeration of valid child process types.

nodes.label: DisposalCodeEnum
nodes.description: Enumreation valid disposal codes.

nodes.label: ProcessTypeEnum
nodes.description: Enumeration of valid process type values.

nodes.label: ActorRoleEnumeration
nodes.description: Enums of the actor role.

nodes.label: RecyclingInformation
nodes.description: The RecyclingInformation aspect model defines a standardized and interoperable representation of recycling-related material shares, including material origin, reutilization, pre- and post-consumer shares, and primary and secondary material sources, in a consistent and machine-readable manner.

nodes.label: reutilizationMaterialShare
nodes.description: Material share from reutilization of materials such as rework, regrind, or scrap materials generated within the process and capable of being reused within the same process that generated it.

nodes.label: origin
nodes.description: Information on material origin.

nodes.label: preConsumerShares
nodes.description: Set of pre consumer material shares.

nodes.label: postConsumerShares
nodes.description: Set of post consumer material shares.

nodes.label: materialSourceShares
nodes.description: Shares of primary and secondary materials

nodes.label: otherInformation
nodes.description: Document or evidence verifying the origin, quality, or compliance of a material

nodes.label: automotive
nodes.description: Share of automotive material

nodes.label: nonAutomotive
nodes.description: Share of non-automotive material.

nodes.label: secondaryMaterial
nodes.description: Material share from all materials obtained from waste, by-products and production residues sources. In the material cycle diagrams, this corresponds to the material flows PrC, PoC and ReU-M.  This includes substances and mixtures of substances that are intended for the manufacture of products. This can include both secondary raw materials and more highly processed substances and mixtures of substances. Secondary material can be used as a substitute for primary material in processes.

nodes.label: primaryMaterial
nodes.description: Material share from Substances and mixtures of substances intended for the manufacture of products and used for the first time in a production process.

nodes.label: MaterialShareTrait
nodes.description: material share trait

nodes.label: OriginEnumeration
nodes.description: Enum of origins

nodes.label: ConsumerShareCharacteristic
nodes.description: Set of shares from automotive and non automotive material shares.

nodes.label: MaterialSourceSingleEntity
nodes.description: Material Source SingleEntity

nodes.label: MaterialShareConstraint
nodes.description: limits the values for material shares to 0-100

nodes.label: ConsumerShareEntity
nodes.description: Set of shares from automotive and non automotive material shares.

nodes.label: MaterialSourceEntity
nodes.description: Material Source Entity.

nodes.label: VehicleInformation
nodes.description: The VehicleInformation aspect model defines a standardized and interoperable set of vehicle attributes, including identification data, technical properties and classification information, to describe a vehicle in a consistent and machine-readable manner.

nodes.label: vehicleCondition
nodes.description: Condition of the actual vehicle.

nodes.label: driveType
nodes.description: Drive type of a vehicle according enumeration.

nodes.label: modelIdentifier
nodes.description: OEM-specific model identifier or OEM-specific project name.

nodes.label: vehicleSeries
nodes.description: Series information of the vehicle model that needs to be processed.

nodes.label: oem
nodes.description: Original equipment manufacturer.

nodes.label: emptyWeight
nodes.description: The empty weight of the vehicle in kg as specified.

nodes.label: productionDate
nodes.description: Production date of the vehicle.

nodes.label: vehicleType
nodes.description: A vehicle type is a classification of a vehicle based on its design, construction, and purpose.

nodes.label: anonymizedVin
nodes.description: OEM-specific hashed VIN.

nodes.label: Date
nodes.description: Characteristic to ensure a consistent structure for date-related properties.

nodes.label: VehicleTypeEnum
nodes.description: Enumeration of vehicle types according to EG Vehicle Classification.

nodes.label: WasteCode
nodes.description: The WasteCode aspect model defines a standardized and interoperable representation of waste categorization information, including European Waste Catalogue (EWC) codes and their descriptions, to classify vehicles, parts or materials in a consistent and machine-readable manner.

nodes.label: wasteCode
nodes.description: The waste code is used to identify the type of waste on part or material level.

nodes.label: WasteCodeEnum
nodes.description: Enumeration of waste codes according to EWC (european waste directory).
